decisions.title_en: Nvidia tops $40B in 2026 AI equity bets, becoming AI investor of last resort
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Fresh meta-narrative crystallized 5-9: Nvidia confirmed >$40B equity stakes across OpenAI ($30B), Anthropic, xAI, IREN ($2.1B), Corning ($3.2B), Marvell ($2B). Includes IREN $2.1B + 5GW DSX deal announced 5-7 as a centerpiece example.

decisions.title_en: Big Tech 2026 AI capex hits $725B record - 77% YoY jump driven by AI infrastructure
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Q1 2026 earnings rollup crystallized as $725B figure across MSFT $190B, Amazon ~$200B, Google $180-190B, Meta $125-145B - 77% YoY jump driven by DRAM +95% QoQ and AI infrastructure.

decisions.title_en: Five publishers + Scott Turow file class action suit against Meta over Llama AI training
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. First publisher copyright class action vs Meta filed 5-5 alleging Zuckerberg personally authorized piracy from LibGen/Anna's Archive. Plaintiffs: Hachette, Macmillan, McGraw Hill, Elsevier, Cengage + Turow.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI launches GPT-5.5-Cyber in limited preview to vetted defenders, scoring 81.9% on CyberGym
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. New cybersecurity-specific frontier model, 81.9% CyberGym, second model to solve multi-step cyber-attack simulation end-to-end. Distinct from openai-realtime-voice-api-launch (5-7) which covered voice models.

decisions.title_en: Cursor 3.3 releases PR Review tab + Build in Parallel + Split PRs

decisions.title_en: Utah Box Elder residents push for November referendum to overturn 9GW Stratos AI data center
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. First major US AI data center political pushback - rural Utah residents apply to add referendum on November ballot to overturn Box Elder commission approval of 9GW Stratos Project (backed by Kevin O'Leary). Need 5,000+ signatures.
